title: contrib/systemd cleanups
body:
This PR includes a series of fixes and clean ups for the systemd service and socket. Please refer to the individual commits for details.

Fixes: #7021

comments.body: Thanks for reviewing and the feedback, @martinpitt. Your comments are addressed in the latest state.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *martinpitt*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
